name: llm-judge still rejects an unknown flag with a usage error after the --text extension
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/llm-judge.sh" --bogus x --rule g-aws-no-unrestricted-ingress 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'unknown arg' err.txt && echo rejects-unknown 1>&2
